note_families.note: Note 1 — Nature of Business and Significant Accounting Policies

policies.cash_and_equivalents: Highly liquid investments with original maturities ≤90 days. Cash in Canadian banks: $7,346,000 (2024).
policies.restricted_cash: Ad Fund restricted cash + state-required franchise fee deposits.
policies.trade_receivables: Carried at original invoice less credit loss estimate ($704,000 at 12/31/2024). Written off when uncollectible.
policies.inventories: FIFO, lower of cost or net realizable value. Graphics, salon supplies, equipment.
policies.property_equipment: Straight-line depreciation. Useful lives: transportation 5-20 years, computer 3-5 years, leasehold improvements 5-10 years, equipment 3-7 years.
policies.leases_rou: ASC 842 adopted 1/1/2022. Operating leases recognized as ROU assets and liabilities. Risk-free discount rate election (US Treasury). Initial ROU assets ~$11.5M, liabilities ~$13.9M. Cumulative adoption adjustment ~$450k to accumulated deficit.
policies.impairment: Reviewed when events indicate non-recoverability. No triggering events 2022-2024.
policies.goodwill: Private company alternative (ASU 2014-02). Amortized straight-line over 10 years. Entity-level impairment testing. Fully amortized in 2024. Original $4,569,158 from two regional franchisee acquisitions.
policies.employee_retention_credit: $3,985,000 recognized in 2022. Receivable of $1,480,000 at 12/31/2024 and 2023.
policies.revenue_recognition: ASC 606. CFF: 6% royalty recognized as underlying sales occur. IFF: deferred and amortized over 12 years (estimated franchise life). Ad Fund: 5% recognized when underlying sales occur.
policies.salon_development_sales: Agent arrangement — recorded net. Gross sales $16,270,000 (2024).
policies.advertising: Franchise development advertising expensed when incurred: $186,000 (2024).
policies.income_taxes: C corporation. Asset/liability method. Deferred taxes on temporary differences. More-likely-than-not threshold for uncertain positions. No unrecognized tax benefits.
policies.foreign_currency: Canadian locations translated at year-end rates (assets/liabilities), period rates (revenue/expense). Translation gains/losses in OCI.
